# PUT /api/roles/{roleId}/pages

**Bulk update role pages (replace mode)**

FULL REPLACE: Replace all page assignments for this role. VIEW is auto-added. Empty array removes all pages.

Operation ID: `syncRolePages`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: ROLE_UPDATE (found on service:RoleAccessService)

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| roleId | integer | Yes |  |

## Request Body

Schema: `SyncRolePagesRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| assignments | array<PageAssignmentDto> | Yes |  | List of page assignments (replaces all existing assignments) |  |
| assignments[].pageCode | string | Yes |  | Page code | USER |
| assignments[].permissions | array<string> | Yes |  | CRUD permissions (VIEW is always added). Use: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE | ['CREATE', 'UPDATE'] |

**Request Example**

```json
{
  "assignments": [
    {
      "pageCode": "USER",
      "permissions": "['CREATE', 'UPDATE']"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `RolePagesMatrixResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| roleId | integer (int64) | No |  | Role ID | 1 |
| roleName | string | No |  | Role display name | System Administrator |
| assignments | array<PageAssignmentResponse> | No |  | List of page assignments with permissions |  |
| assignments[].pageCode | string | No |  | Page code | USER |
| assignments[].pageName | string | No |  | Page name (English) | User Management |
| assignments[].pageNameAr | string | No |  | Page name (Arabic) | إدارة المستخدمين |
| assignments[].permissions | array<string> | No |  | CRUD permissions (VIEW is implicit, only CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE returned) | ['CREATE', 'UPDATE'] |

**Response Example**

```json
{
  "roleId": 1,
  "roleName": "System Administrator",
  "assignments": [
    {
      "pageCode": "USER",
      "pageName": "User Management",
      "pageNameAr": "إدارة المستخدمين",
      "permissions": "['CREATE', 'UPDATE']"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| FORBIDDEN | FORBIDDEN | A specific permission check was found for this endpoint (@PreAuthorize/@Secured); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AccessDeniedException to this status. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |
